summary: Module System testing complete. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for both Admin Module Builder and Student My Courses sections. Fixed route ordering bug in modules.js that was causing reorder endpoint to fail (PATCH /modules/reorder was being intercepted by PATCH /modules/:moduleId). Both Admin and Student flows are fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules - List modules for a programme
GET /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules?active=true - Filter active modules
GET /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules - 404 for non-existent programme
POST /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules - Create new module with all fields
POST /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules - Validation: title too short rejected
POST /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules - Auto-calculate order if not provided
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId - Update module
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId - Partial update works
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId - Returns 404 for non-existent
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/reorder - Bulk reorder modules
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/reorder - Rejects empty array
DELETE /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId - Soft delete (deactivate)
DELETE /api/admin/programmes/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId - Returns 404 for non-existent
Admin modules API - Returns 401 without authentication
GET /api/student/courses - List enrolled courses with progress
GET /api/student/courses/:programmeId - Get course detail with modules and progress
GET /api/student/courses/:programmeId - 403 for non-enrolled course
PATCH /api/student/courses/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId/progress - Start module (in_progress)
PATCH /api/student/courses/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId/progress - Complete module
PATCH /api/student/courses/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId/progress - Rejects invalid status
PATCH /api/student/courses/:programmeId/modules/:moduleId/progress - 403 for wrong course
Student progress calculation - Overall progress percentage correct
Student courses API - Returns 401 without authentication
Access Control: Student cannot access admin module APIs (403)
Access Control: Admin cannot access student course APIs (403)
UI: Admin Module Builder Panel opens from Courses page (Layers icon)
UI: Module Builder shows Add Module button and module list
UI: Add Module modal has all fields (title, description, content, duration, order, status)
UI: Module cards display with drag handles for reordering
UI: Student My Courses page shows enrolled course with progress bar
UI: Course Detail page shows modules list and content panel
UI: Module status badges display correctly (Completed, In Progress, Not Started)

bugs_fixed.root_cause: PATCH /:programmeId/modules/:moduleId route was defined before PATCH /:programmeId/modules/reorder, causing 'reorder' to be captured as :moduleId and returning 404
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved the /reorder route definition BEFORE the /:moduleId route to ensure static paths are matched before parameterized paths

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in Express is critical - static paths must come before parameterized paths
Module progress tracking correctly uses upsert pattern (create if not exists, update if exists)
Soft delete pattern used for modules - is_active flag instead of hard delete
Student enrollment check properly validates course_id matches and status='enrolled'
Module content supports HTML rendering with dangerouslySetInnerHTML (consider sanitization for production)
data-testid attributes properly added to all key interactive elements

modules: 01. Introduction to Dental Implants (45 min) - completed
02. Implant Planning and Diagnostics (60 min) - completed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Module System fully tested. Admin CRUD for modules works via Module Builder Panel (accessible via Layers icon on Courses page). Student My Courses shows enrolled courses with progress tracking. Progress calculation: completedModules/totalModules * 100. Route fix applied: /reorder must be defined before /:moduleId in Express routes. All modules for the enrolled student are already completed (100%), so testing Start/Complete buttons requires creating a new student or resetting progress.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

frontend_admin.module_builder_panel: Opens from Courses page via Layers icon
frontend_admin.drag_drop: Module cards have drag handles for reordering (@dnd-kit)

frontend_student.my_courses_page: Shows enrolled courses with progress bar
frontend_student.course_detail_page: Shows modules list and content panel
frontend_student.progress_buttons: Start Module / Mark as Complete buttons
